case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MONTECINOS, JOSE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTECINOS, JOSE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,075.49 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONTECINOS, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTECINOS, JOSE $3,075.49 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,101.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
